nodes.label: Alpecca
nodes.detail: One authoritative Alpecca runtime and its current evidence snapshot.

nodes.label: Cognition
nodes.detail: Local model routing, response loop, grounded state, and bounded decisions.

nodes.label: Seven-perspective Soul
nodes.detail: Feeler, Expressor, Carer, Doer, Wanderer, Reflector, and Improver expose one live bounded advisory vector feeding the existing arbitration path; model_calls=0 and they are not independent transformer instances.

nodes.label: Memory
nodes.detail: Persistent recall, observations, continuity, and context evidence.

nodes.label: Mindpage
nodes.detail: Measured context budgeting, paging, eviction writeback, and pressure telemetry.

nodes.label: Temporal Memory Shadow
nodes.detail: Additive source-provenanced temporal facts and shadow recall comparison while legacy recall remains authoritative.

nodes.label: Selective Soul Runtime
nodes.detail: Bounded advisory escalation over deterministic Soul evidence without action authority.

nodes.label: Perception
nodes.detail: Screen, camera, audio, files, and environmental sensing under capability gates.

nodes.label: Discord
nodes.detail: Claimed-room text, media, and bounded duplex voice bridge.

nodes.label: Video Companion
nodes.detail: Bounded descriptor-only file and live-video companion timeline state.

nodes.label: ASR Dispatch
nodes.detail: Bounded speech-recognition backend selection, capability facts, and fallback status.

nodes.label: Speaker Worker
nodes.detail: Isolated CPU speaker familiarity with no authentication or authority grant.

nodes.label: Face Worker
nodes.detail: Isolated CPU face familiarity with bounded images and no retained frame or authority grant.

nodes.label: Event-driven Vision
nodes.detail: One serialized bounded vision lane with priority, coalescing, cancellation, and no raw-frame persistence.

nodes.label: Voice
nodes.detail: Evidence-backed House session, canonical synthesis-route, and Discord send/receive/VAD runtime status; missing live evidence remains unknown.

nodes.label: VRM Embodiment
nodes.detail: Alpecca's VRM 1.0 body, expressions, motion, physics, and interaction reach.

nodes.label: Mindscape Vault
nodes.detail: Encrypted passive cloud backup while the local runtime remains authoritative.

nodes.label: Recursive Improvement
nodes.detail: Evidence-backed proposals, bounded trials, evaluation, approval, and rollback.

nodes.label: Staged Roadmap
nodes.detail: The current implementation roadmap, including verified and unfinished work.

nodes.label: P0 Truth baseline
nodes.detail: Verified truth and capability baseline.

nodes.label: P1 Security containment
nodes.detail: Trusted-device security exists; release scans and clean public-shell gates remain open.

nodes.label: P2 Identity + singleton
nodes.detail: Stable creator identity, cross-process singleton ownership, portal fencing, and trusted-device exchange are verified.

nodes.label: P3 Turn transactions
nodes.detail: Scoped turn context, commit barriers, and partitioned history are verified.

nodes.label: P4 Commitment closure
nodes.detail: The bounded phase gate is complete: cue-to-commitment flow and exactly-once receipt-backed self-status execution are verified.

nodes.label: P5 Initiative + affect
nodes.detail: The bounded phase gate is complete: shared initiative budgeting, dedupe, one-surface delivery, backoff, and grounded affect are verified.

nodes.label: P6 Mindpage + resources
nodes.detail: Paging and resource sensing exist; the authorized real 9B context-tier measurement remains open.

nodes.label: P7 Pagefile broker
nodes.detail: Bounded read-only telemetry and digest-bound one-use CreatorJD request/approval are live. No consume, mutation, execution, or elevation route exists; live safe 8K evidence, fresh readback, UAC, one bounded write, and post-write verification remain blocked.

nodes.label: P8 Bounded RSI
nodes.detail: Controller tests pass; the required creator-portal lifecycle soak remains open.

nodes.label: P9 Perception + egress
nodes.detail: Local ingress, exact one-use creator-consented remote perception, and House Privacy controls are implemented; only the live configured-provider soak remains.

nodes.label: P10 Discord + voice
nodes.detail: Duplex baseline exists; real CreatorJD microphone latency and acoustic approval remain pending.

nodes.label: P11 Contact + outbox
nodes.detail: Web Push connection-test slice exists; device enrollment soak and other transports remain unfinished.

nodes.label: P12 V4 embodiment
nodes.detail: Grounding and gait tests pass; authenticated visual walking and physics soak remain open.

nodes.label: P13 Cloud continuity
nodes.detail: Encrypted passive vault and inert standby scaffolds exist; restore still needs a digest-bound one-use preview approval and failover authority remains disabled.

nodes.label: P14 Release soak
nodes.detail: An observation-only soak harness has started, but live soak evidence and a clean repository-wide collection gate are still required.
